GuiHelpRemoteCliPreview: Remote management currently uses PowerShell Remoting through the CLI only. The GUI does not yet provide a remote connection or session workflow.
GuiHelpRemoteExpertRequirements: Enterprise readiness still requires an explicit connection layer, reusable session tracking, visible target context, per-machine execution reporting, and aggregated remote logs.
GuiHelpRemoteManagedDevices: Managed, work, school, or domain-enrolled devices should be reviewed with the appropriate admin team before remote runs.
GuiHelpRemoteSafeSingleTarget: Treat remote use as an admin-reviewed lab workflow: connect explicitly, validate one machine first, and prefer read-only compliance checks before apply runs.
GuiHelpRemoteStandardRequirements: Before using remote targeting, verify WinRM, firewall access, credentials, and managed-device policy constraints.

TweakWhy_AccountProtectionWarn: Windows Security yerekana iburira niba utinjiye ukoresheje konti ya Microsoft. Kuzimya bihisha iri tangazo risubiramo.
TweakWhy_ActiveHours: Igena igihe Windows itazongera gutangira mu buryo bwikora PC yawe kugira ngo irangize gushyiraho updates.
TweakWhy_ActivityHistory: Yandika ibikorwa byawe ku mashini zose igihe winjiye ukoresheje konti ya Microsoft kandi ishobora kubihuza na cloud. Kuzimya bigumya ibikorwa ku mashini yawe.
TweakWhy_AdminApprovalMode: Igenzura uburyo User Account Control yitwara igihe app isabye uburenganzira bwihariye. Default isaba kwemeza, Never izimya amatangazo ya UAC. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranyije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mirimo imwe.
TweakWhy_AdobeNetworkBlock: Adds firewall rules to block Adobe applications from accessing the internet. This affects licence validation, cloud sync, and Creative Cloud features. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.
TweakWhy_AdvancedStartupShortcut: Ikora shortcut kuri desktop yongera gutangiza ako kanya PC mu menu ya Advanced Startup Options (Windows Recovery Environment).
TweakWhy_AdvertisingID: Windows iha konti yawe advertising ID yihariye apps zishobora gukoresha kugira ngo zerekane ads zigenewe. Kuzimya bihagarika uku gukurikirana.
TweakWhy_AeroShaking: Gusiga umutwe w'idirishya gutuma ayandi madirishya yose afunguye yigabanya. Hagarika niba ubona ibi bibaho mu buryo bw'impanuka mu gukoresha bisanzwe.
TweakWhy_AppColorMode: Sets the default colour mode that applications use when they respect the system setting: Dark or Light.
TweakWhy_AppsLanguageSwitch: Itanga uburenganzira Windows kwibuka no guhindukirira ururimi rutandukanye rw'igikoresho cyo kwinjiza cyangwa uburyo bwa mudasobwa buri gice cyihariye cya porogaramu.
TweakWhy_AppsSilentInstalling: Windows can silently install suggested apps in the background without asking you. Disabling stops this behaviour. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_AppsSmartScreen: SmartScreen igenzura amadosiye na porogaramu zimaze gukururwa ku bubiko buzwi bw'igicu kandi ikuburira mbere yo gukora abayobozi batazwi. Ihinduka ritwara ibyago biciriritse kandi birashobora kugira ingaruka kubikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_AutoRebootOnCrash: Iyo Windows yahagaze (ecran bleu), ishobora kongera gutangira. Guhagarika bituma ikosa rigumaho kuri ecran kugira ngo ushobore gusoma kode yo guhagarara.
TweakWhy_Autoplay: Igenzura niba Windows ifungura itangazo cyangwa itangiza porogaramu mu buryo bwikora iyo winjije USB cyangwa ibindi byuma bishobora gukurwaho.
TweakWhy_BSoDStopError: Igaragaza kode yihariye y'ikosa kuri BSOD aho kwerekana gusa ikimenyetso rusange cy'umuntu ubabaye.
TweakWhy_BackgroundApps: Igenzura niba porogaramu zemerewe gukora no kuvugururwa mu gihe zitari mu ruhame. Guhagarika bizigama CPU n'ububiko. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bikomeye kandi rishobora kuba rigoye cyangwa ridashoboka gusubiza.
TweakWhy_BingSearch: Agasanduku ko gushakisha ka Start Menu gashobora kwerekana ibisubizo bya Bing hamwe n'ibisubizo by'aha hafi. Guhagarika bituma gushakisha kuri Start Menu kuba kw'aha hafi gusa.
TweakWhy_BootRecovery: Igenzura niba Windows yinjira mu buryo bwo gukira mu buryo bwikora nyuma y'ubushake bwinshi bwo gutangira butanyuze. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_BraveDebloat: Ihagarika ibindi byongera bya Brave browser: ibihembo, ikarita y'amafaranga ya crypto, VPN, na AI chat. Bigira gusa ingaruka kuri ibi biranga bya Brave, ntabwo ari ukureba urubuga. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bikomeye kandi rishobora kuba rigoye cyangwa ridashoboka gusubiza.
TweakWhy_BuildNumberOnDesktop: Igaragaza nimero ya build ya Windows n'icapiro nk'ikimenyetso cy'amazi mu nguni y'epfo iburyo ya desktop yawe.
TweakWhy_CABInstallContext: Yongeramo uburyo bwo Kwinjiza mu rutonde rw'amahitamo rugaragara iyo ukanze buto y'iburyo ku madosiye .cab.
TweakWhy_CIMemoryIntegrity: Hypervisor-protected code integrity ikoresha kode ya kernel ya Windows mu buryo bwa virtualisation kugira ngo irinde malware na rootkits ku rwego rwa kernel. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_Camera: Buto rusange igenzura niba porogaramu zishobora gusaba kugera kuri kamera yawe. Guhagarika bibuza porogaramu zose gukoresha kamera. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_CapsLock: Igenzura niba urufunguzo Caps Lock rukora. Guhagarika bihindura urufunguzo Caps Lock ku buryo gukanda ntacyo bikora.
TweakWhy_ChangingSoundScheme: Igenzura niba abakoresha bashobora guhindura igishushanyo cy'amajwi cya Windows. Guhagarika ibi bifunga igishushanyo cyariho bikabuza impinduka.
TweakWhy_CheckBoxes: Igaragaza uduboxe duto duto iruhande rw'amadosiye n'ububiko muri Explorer kugira ngo byorohe guhitamo ibintu byinshi utarimo gukanda Ctrl.
TweakWhy_CheckWinGet: WinGet ni Windows 'yubatswe muri pack yamashanyarazi ikoreshwa mugushiraho no kuvugurura porogaramu kuva kumurongo. Ibi byemeza ko byashizweho kandi bigezweho.
TweakWhy_ClearRecentFiles: Ikuraho mu buryo bwikora urutonde rw'amadosiye ya vuba buri gihe usohoka. Byongera ibanga kuri mudasobwa zisangiwe cyangwa zikoreshwa n'abakoresha benshi.
TweakWhy_ClipboardHistory: Ibika amateka y'ibintu wakoporoye kugira ngo ushobore kubyomeka uhereye ku byakoporowe mbere ukoresheje Win+V. Emeza kugira ngo ukoreshe iki giranga.
TweakWhy_CompressedFolderNewContext: Yerekana cyangwa ihisha uburyo bw'Ububiko bwa Compressed (zipped) mu rutonde rwa Gishya rugaragara iyo ukanze buto y'iburyo muri File Explorer.
TweakWhy_ConnectionSharing: Itanga uburenganzira iyi PC gusangira urushundura rwayo rwa interineti n'ibindi byuma, ikora nka hotspot ya software. Kwemeza byerekana iri hitamo mu bigenamiterere bya network. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_ControlPanelView: Igena uburyo mburabuzi bwo kwerekana Control Panel nk'Ibimenyetso Binini, Ibimenyetso Bito, cyangwa itsinda rya Category mburabuzi.
TweakWhy_Copilot: Ikuraho Copilot, Recall, n'ibindi byose bifitanye isano na Windows AI. Kongera kubishyiramo bisaba kugera kuri winget cyangwa Microsoft Store.
TweakWhy_CortanaAutostart: Ibuza Cortana gutangira mu buryo bwikora mu gihe cyo gutangira. Cortana iracyashobora gufungurwa ku bushake niba bikenewe.
TweakWhy_CreateRestorePoint: Ikora Windows System Restore point kugira ngo ushobore gusubiza impinduka za sisitemu niba hari ikitagenze neza. Birasabwa mbere yo gukoresha impinduka izo ari zo zose.
TweakWhy_CrossDeviceResume: Ikwemerera gukomeza imirimo uhereye ku bindi byuma bya Windows kuri iyi PC binyuze ku itangazo rigaragara. Hagarika niba udakoresha iki giranga cyo hagati y'ibyuma.
TweakWhy_CurrentNetwork: Igena umwirondoro wa network ku rushundura rwawe rukora ubu. Private yemeza ubushakashatsi na network sharing, Public ibibuza. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_DEPOptOut: Igena Data Execution Prevention mu buryo bwa OptOut, ikemeza DEP protection kuri processes zose uretse izo wasobanuye ku buryo bwihariye. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_DNSoverHTTPS: Ibika DNS lookups mu ibanga yoherereza binyuze kuri HTTPS aho kuba UDP isanzwe. Ibuza ISP yawe cyangwa network kugenzura cyangwa guhindura DNS traffic. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_DefaultTerminalApp: Igena ni terminal application ifungura iyo utangiye Command Prompt cyangwa PowerShell muri Windows.
TweakWhy_DefenderAppGuard: Ifungura amatabs ya Edge browser mu virtual machine yitaruye kugira ngo ibuze urubuga rwangiza kugera ku host system cyangwa amadosiye yayo. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_DefenderCloud: Ikemeza Microsoft Defender's cloud-based protection yo gushakisha iterabwoba mu gihe nyacyo ikoresheje Microsoft's global threat intelligence database. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_DefenderSandbox: Ikoresha Microsoft Defender antivirus engine imbere muri sandbox process yitaruye kugira ngo habeho kurinda byongera. Byongera imbaraga nkeya za performance. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_DefenderTrayIcon: Yerekana cyangwa ihisha ikimenyetso cya Windows Security (Defender) muri system tray. Kubihisha ntibihagarika kurinda kwa Defender.
TweakWhy_DeliveryOptimization: Windows ishobora gukoresha PC yawe gusangira amakuru yo gukurura Windows Update n'izindi PC kuri network yawe cyangwa interineti. Guhagarika bituma gukurura kwawe bikomeza kuba ibanga. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_DiagTrackService: Serivise ya DiagTrack ikusanya kandi yohereza amakuru y'ikoreshwa rya Windows n'amakuru ya diagnostic kuri server za Microsoft. Kuyihagarika bihagarika kohereza telemetry mu nyuma. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_DiagnosticDataLevel: Igenzura amakuru angana ki ya diagnostic Windows yohereza kuri Microsoft. Minimal yohereza gusa amakuru y'ibanze y'igikoresho n'amakuru yo kwizerwa.
TweakWhy_DisableAESCiphers: Ihagarika AES cipher entries za kera zidakomeye muri Windows SCHANNEL security layer. Ihatira porogaramu kwemeranya kuri cipher configurations zikomeye. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_DisableAutoRun: Ibuza Windows gukoresha porogaramu mu buryo bwikora kuri USB drives n'ibindi byuma bishobora gukurwaho. Bihagarika inzira isanzwe yo gukwirakwiza malware.
TweakWhy_DisableHashAlgorithms: Igena ibigenamiterere bya SCHANNEL hash algorithm. Ihagarika MD5 kandi ikemeza SHA family algorithms kugira ngo habeho kwemeza integrity bikomeye. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_DisableIPv6: Ihagarika IPv6 protocol stack kuri sisitemu yose. Birasabwa niba network yawe idakoresha IPv6 kugira ngo hagabanywe attack surface idakenewe. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_DisableRC2RC4Ciphers: Ihagarika RC2 na RC4 ciphers muri SCHANNEL. Izi algorithms zangijwe muri cryptography kandi ntizigomba gukoreshwa muri TLS connection iyo ari yo yose. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_DisableRemoteCommands: DCOM ni remote activation protocol ikenewe n'ibikoresho by'ubuyobozi bw'ibigo (SCCM, WMI). Kuyihagarika bigabanya attack surface ariko bishobora guhungabanya imirimo yo gucunga kure.
TweakWhy_DisableSMBv3Compression: Ihagarika SMB compression kugira ngo irinde CVE-2020-0796. Bigira gusa ingaruka ku ihinduka rya SMB traffic, si umuvuduko wo kugera ku madosiye. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_DisableTCPTimestamps: Ikuraho amakuru ya TCP timestamp mu network packets. Ibuza sisitemu za kure kumenyekanisha OS yawe zishingiye ku gihe ikora. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_DisableTripleDESCipher: Ihagarika Triple DES (3DES) muri SCHANNEL. 3DES yugarijwe na SWEET32 birthday attacks kandi ntabwo ikibonwa nk'ikizewe. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_DiskCleanup: Ikoresha igikoresho cya Windows Disk Cleanup giherekejwe kugira ngo gikureho amadosiye y'igihe gito, cache ya sisitemu, n'andi makuru adakenewe kugira ngo hatangwe umwanya kuri disiki. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_DismissMSAccount: Ikuraho itangazo risubirwamo muri Windows Security rikusaba kwinjira ukoresheje konti ya Microsoft kugira ngo habeho kurinda byongera.
TweakWhy_DismissSmartScreenFilter: Ikuraho itangazo risubirwamo muri Windows Security rikusaba kwemeza SmartScreen reputation filter.
TweakWhy_DownloadBlocking: Igenzura niba Windows Security ishyira ikimenyetso ku madosiye yakuruwe nk'ashobora kuba atizewe ikoresheje Zone.Identifier alternate data stream.
TweakWhy_EdgeDebloat: Ishyira ibigenamiterere bya Group Policy kugira ngo ihagarike telemetry, umufasha wo kugura, amatsinda, Copilot sidebar, n'ibindi byongera bya Edge. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bikomeye kandi rishobora kuba rigoye cyangwa ridashoboka gusubiza.
TweakWhy_EditWithClipchampContext: Yerekana cyangwa ihisha uburyo bwo Kwandika na Clipchamp video editor mu rutonde rw'amahitamo rugaragara iyo ukanze buto y'iburyo ku madosiye ya video.
TweakWhy_EditWithPaintContext: Yerekana cyangwa ihisha uburyo bwo Kwandika na Paint mu rutonde rw'amahitamo rugaragara iyo ukanze buto y'iburyo ku madosiye y'amashusho.
TweakWhy_EditWithPhotosContext: Yerekana cyangwa ihisha uburyo bwo Kwandika na Photos mu rutonde rw'amahitamo rugaragara iyo ukanze buto y'iburyo ku madosiye y'amashusho.
TweakWhy_EnableBiometricsAntiSpoofing: Ikemeza anti-spoofing yongerewe imbaraga kuri Windows Hello facial recognition. Bigira gusa ingaruka niba ufite biometric hardware ihuye.
TweakWhy_EnableSMBGuestCompatibility: Itanga uburenganzira SMB connections kuri network shares nta kwemeza bikenewe. Bikenewe kugira ngo ugere kuri NAS devices za kera, mudasobwa za kwandika, cyangwa routers. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_EncCompFilesColor: Yerekana amadosiye yabikwamo mu ibara ry'icyatsi n'amadosiye yeguriwe mu ibara ry'ubururu muri File Explorer. Bituma amoko y'amadosiye agaragara ako kanya.
TweakWhy_EnhPointerPrecision: Mouse acceleration ihindura umuvuduko wa cursor ishingiye ku buryo wimura mouse mu buryo bw'umubiri. Hagarika kugira ngo habeho raw mouse input ihamye, birasabwa ku mukino.
TweakWhy_ErrorReporting: Iyo porogaramu yahagaze, Windows Error Reporting ishobora kohereza raporo kuri Microsoft. Guhagarika bihagarika aya makuru kuva kuri mudasobwa yawe.
TweakWhy_EventViewerCustomView: Ikora custom view muri Event Viewer yihariye yo kwerekana process creation events, bituma byoroha kugenzura porogaramu zitangiye gukoreshwa.
TweakWhy_ExplorerAutoDiscovery: File Explorer imenya ubwoko bw'ibirimo buri bubiko kandi ikoresha view template ihuye. Guhagarika bifunga amabubiko yose ku view rusange ihamye.
TweakWhy_ExplorerTitleFullPath: Yerekana inzira yuzuye y'ububiko mu File Explorer title bar aho kwerekana gusa izina ry'ububiko. Bifite akamaro iyo ukorana n'ababiko benshi b'izina rimwe.
TweakWhy_F1HelpPage: Gukanda F1 muri File Explorer cyangwa kuri desktop bifungura urubuga rw'ubufasha rwa Windows muri browser yawe. Guhagarika bibuza ifungurwa rya browser.
TweakWhy_F8BootMenu: Ikemeza legacy F8 key boot menu ikwemerera guhitamo Safe Mode n'andi mahitamo yo gutangira mu gihe cya Windows boot.
TweakWhy_FastStartup: Uburyo bw'ihinduka bw'ihagarika bubika state ya kernel kuri disiki kugira ngo Windows itangire vuba. Bishobora gutera ibibazo ku dual-boot setups cyangwa full shutdowns.
TweakWhy_FeedbackFrequency: Igenzura inshuro Windows ikusaba gutanga amanota ku bunararibonye bwawe cyangwa kohereza ibitekerezo. Gushyira kuri Never bihagarika amatangazo yose y'ibitekerezo.
TweakWhy_FileDeleteConfirm: Yerekana ikiganiro cyo kwemeza mbere yo gusiba idosiye burundu. Emeza kugira ngo uhabwe itangazo mbere y'uko amadosiye yoherezwa muri Recycle Bin.
TweakWhy_FileExplorerCompactMode: Igabanya umwanya hagati y'ibintu muri File Explorer kugira ngo habeho urutonde rufite amakuru menshi.
TweakWhy_FileExtensions: Yerekana extension y'idosiye (urugero .txt, .exe) nyuma ya buri zina ry'idosiye muri Explorer. Bifasha kumenya ubwoko bw'idosiye ako kanya.
TweakWhy_FileOperationsDetails: Yerekana mburabuzi ikiganiro cy'amakuru arambuye cy'imirimo y'amadosiye (gukoporora, kwimura, gusiba) aho kwerekana progress bar ntoya.
TweakWhy_FileTransferDialog: Igenzura niba ikiganiro cyo gukoporora no kwimura amadosiye cyerekana mburabuzi amakuru yuzuye nk'umuvuduko n'igihe gisigaye.
TweakWhy_Firewall: Ikemeza cyangwa ihagarika Windows Defender Firewall kuri network profiles zose. Guhagarika bisiga ports zose zinjira zidafiltered rwose. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago bigereranije kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_FirstLogonAnimation: Yerekana animation ngufi yo kwakira na Hi screen ubwa mbere winjiye nyuma y'ihinduka rikomeye rya Windows.
TweakWhy_FldrSeparateProcess: Ifungura buri Explorer folder window muri process yayo. Niba imwe ihagaze, izindi zigumaho zifunguye. Ikoresha ububiko buke byongeye.
TweakWhy_FolderGroupBy: Igenzura niba amadosiye mu bubiko bwa Downloads ashyirwa mu itsinda hashingiwe ku itariki yahinduriweho. Gushyira kuri None byerekana amadosiye yose mu rutonde rusanzwe.
TweakWhy_FullscreenOptimizations: A Windows feature that optimises games and apps running in fullscreen mode for better performance. Disabling can fix compatibility issues in some older games.
TweakWhy_GPUScheduling: Gahunda ya GPU yihuse hakoreshejwe hardware iha GPU ubushobozi bwo gucunga ubwayo ububiko bwa video mu buryo butaziguye, bishobora kugabanya igihe cyo gutanga amakuru mu mikino.
TweakWhy_GameDVR: Kwandika inyuma bifata imikino buri gihe kugira ngo ushobore kubika iminota mike ya nyuma nyuma y'igikorwa. Kuyihagarika bituma GPU na disiki bibohoka kugira ngo FPS ihame neza.
TweakWhy_Hibernation: Ibika ibikubiye byose muri RAM kuri disiki kandi ikazimya PC burundu. Idosiye y'ibitotsi ishobora gukoresha gigabayite nyinshi z'umwanya wa disiki.
TweakWhy_HiddenItems: Yerekana amadosiye n'amabubiko yashyizweho ikimenyetso cyo guhishwa muri File Explorer. Ibintu byahishwe bigaragara bitagaragara neza iyo bigaragara.
TweakWhy_HomeGroups: Home Groups yari ikintu cya Windows cyo gusangira amadosiye hagati ya PC zo mu rugo. Yakuweho muri Windows 10 1803 ariko serivisi zisigaye zishobora kuba zikiriho.
TweakWhy_ImportExploitProtectionPolicy: Ikuramo kandi yinjiza idosiye y'ingamba zo kwirinda exploit yari yarateguwe muri Windows Defender Exploit Guard, ikurikiza ingamba z'ikubaturamo kwihariye. Iri ni impinduka ifite ikiza kinini ishobora kuba ikomeye cyangwa idashoboka kubisubizaho.
TweakWhy_InputMethod: Igena uburyo bw'ibanze bwo kwinjiza ibyandikishwa Windows ikoresha. Icyongereza gishyiraho ubushyinguro bw'Icyongereza bitaba ibindi ndimi zashyizwemo.
TweakWhy_JPEGWallpapersQuality: Windows yegeranya amashusho ya JPEG yo ku rukuta igihe iyashyira ku nyuma y'ibiro. Gushyira kuri Max bibika ubwiza bwuzuye bw'ishusho.
TweakWhy_LLMNR: Link-Local Multicast Name Resolution ikemura amazina y'ibikoresho ku mbuga za hafi. Ishobora gukoreshwa nabi mu bitero byo gufata indangamuntu kandi ni byiza kuyihagarika. Iyi mpinduka ifite ikiza cyo hagati kandi ishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe na bimwe.
TweakWhy_LanguageListAccess: Yemerera urubuga gusoma urutonde rwawe rw'indimi za Windows kugira ngo ruhuze ibirimo. Hagarika kugira ngo urubuga rutamenye amashyiraho y'ururimi rwawe.
TweakWhy_LanmanWorkstationGuestAuthPolic: Kwemeza umushyitsi kuri SMB ni inzira izwi yo kwimura nabi ihagarikwa kuva Windows 10 1709. Kuyemerera bishyira sisitemu mu kaga ko kugerwaho na SMB utemewe. Emera gusa kubijyanye n'ibikoresho bya kera.
TweakWhy_LatestInstalled.NET: Ihatira porogaramu za 32-bit na 64-bit gukoresha verisiyo nshya ya .NET yinjijwe aho gukoresha verisiyo bari barakozweho.
TweakWhy_LocalSecurityAuthority: Ikora igikorwa cya Windows LSA mu buryo bwo kurindwa kugira ngo yirinde kwiba indangamuntu n'ibikoresho nka Mimikatz. Birasabwa kuri sisitemu zose. Iyi mpinduka ifite ikiza cyo hagati kandi ishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe na bimwe.
TweakWhy_LocationService: Igenzura niba porogaramu zishobora kugera ku myanya ya geografiya y'igikoresho cyawe. Kuyihagarika bituma amashyiraho y'aho uri atakurikiranwa na porogaramu zose. Iyi mpinduka ifite ikiza cyo hagati kandi ishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe na bimwe.
TweakWhy_LockScreen: Igenzura niba ecran yo gufunga ya Windows igaragara mbere ya ecran yo kwinjira kuri Windows 11.
TweakWhy_LockScreenBlur: Ishyiraho ingaruka yo gucika acrylic ku nyuma ya ecran yo kwinjira. Kuyihagarika byerekana inyuma nta gucika.
TweakWhy_LockScreenRS1: Igenzura niba ecran yo gufunga ya Windows igaragara mbere ya ecran yo kwinjira kuri Windows 10 (inzira ya politiki y'igihe cya RS1).
TweakWhy_LockWidgets: Windows Web Experience Pack yongera widget n'ibirimo bihindagurika kuri ecran yo gufunga no kuri taskbar. Kuyihagarika bikuraho ibi.
TweakWhy_MSIExtractContext: Yongera ihitamo rya Extract ku menu yo gukanda iburyo ku madosiye ya .msi, bikwemerera gushakisha ibiyirimo utabanje gukoresha installer.
TweakWhy_MSNetClient: Umukiriya wa Microsoft Networks wemerera iyi PC kugera ku madosiye na printer zisangiwe n'izindi mudasobwa za Windows ku rusobe. Iyi mpinduka ifite ikiza cyo hagati kandi ishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe na bimwe.
TweakWhy_MaintenanceWakeUp: Windows ishobora kubyutsa PC yawe mu gitotsi nijoro kugira ngo ikore imirimo yo kubungabunga. Kuyihagarika birinda kubyuka bitatewe nijoro.
TweakWhy_MapUpdates: Windows Maps ishobora gukuramo amakarita mashya ya offline mu buryo bwikora. Kuyihagarika bizigama urusobe niba utakoresha porogaramu ya Maps.
TweakWhy_MeetNow: Ikimenyetso cya Meet Now mu gace k'imenyesha
TweakWhy_MergeConflicts: Yerekana iburira igihe uhuza amabubiko arimo amadosiye afite izina rimwe. Hagarika kugira ngo usimbuze amadosiye nta kubaza.
TweakWhy_Microphone: Urufunguzo rukuru rugenzura niba porogaramu zishobora gusaba kugera kuri microfoni yawe. Kuyihagarika birinda porogaramu zose gukoresha mic. Iyi mpinduka ifite ikiza cyo hagati kandi ishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe na bimwe.
TweakWhy_MostUsedApps: Yerekana porogaramu ukoresha cyane hejuru y'urutonde rwa porogaramu rwa Start Menu kugira ngo ubigereho vuba.
TweakWhy_MouseAcceleration: Enhance Pointer Precision ipima kunyeganyega kwa mouse hashingiwe ku muvuduko. Kuyihagarika bitanga igipimo cya 1:1 gikunzwe n'abakinnyi ba FPS b'amarushanwa ku buryo bwo kurasa bwuzuye.
TweakWhy_MultiplaneOverlay: Ikintu cya GPU compositing gishobora kunoza imikorere. Kuyihagarika bishobora gukemura amakosa y'ishusho cyangwa guhunga mu bigenamiterere bimwe by'ecran.
TweakWhy_MultipleInvokeContext: Iyo uhisemo amadosiye 15 cyangwa arenga ukanda iburyo, Windows ikunda kwerekana iburira mbere yo kwerekana menu. Ibi bizamura cyangwa bikuraho iryo pimo.
TweakWhy_NCSIProbe: Network Connectivity Status Indicator igenzura guhuza mu kohereza ping kuri seriveri za Microsoft. Kuyihagarika bishobora kwerekana ibimenyetso by'urusobe bidahuye n'ukuri. Iyi mpinduka ifite ikiza cyo hagati kandi ishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe na bimwe.
TweakWhy_NTFSLastAccess: Yongera igihe ku idosiye buri gihe isomwe. Kuyihagarika bigabanya ibikorwa byo kwandika kuri disiki kuri sisitemu zifite amadosiye mato menshi asomwa.
TweakWhy_NTFSLongPaths: Ikuraho imbibi ya karakteri 260 ku nzira z'amadosiye. Birakenewe ku bikoresho bimwe byo gutezimbere n'amabubiko ashyizwe mu bujyakuzimu.
TweakWhy_NaglesAlgorithm: Igabanya buffering y'urusobe kugira ngo paketi zoherezwe ako kanya. Ishobora kugabanya latency mu bakinnyi benshi bahatana, ariko ishobora kugira ingaruka ku buhamye bwo guhuza ku misobe imwe. Hagarika niba ubona guhuza gucika.
TweakWhy_NavPaneAllFolders: Yerekana amabubiko yose yo muri uyu mudasobwa harimo n'amabubiko ya sisitemu yahishwe mu gace ko kuyobora k'ibumoso kwa Explorer.
TweakWhy_NavPaneLibraries: Yerekana igice cya Libraries (Documents, Music, Pictures, Videos) mu gace ko kuyobora k'ibumoso kwa Explorer.
TweakWhy_NavigationPaneExpand: Agace ko kuyobora ka Explorer kagura kandi kagenda kugira ngo kagaragaze ibubiko urimo kureba ubu.
TweakWhy_NetBIOS: NetBIOS ni porotokole ya kera yo gukemura amazina ikoreshwa mu gusangira amadosiye ya Windows. Kuyihagarika kuri misobe ya kijyambere bigabanya urujya n'uruza rw'ubutumwa butari ngombwa. Iyi mpinduka ifite ikiza cyo hagati kandi ishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe na bimwe.
TweakWhy_NetDevicesAutoInst: Igenzura niba Windows ikuramo kandi ishyiraho driver mu buryo bwikora ku bikoresho by'urusobe bishya byahujwe.
TweakWhy_NetworkAdaptersSavePower: Yemerera Windows gushyira network adapter mu buryo bw'amashanyarazi make iyo zidakora. Kuyihagarika birinda gutinda gato byo guhuza nyuma y'uko adapter ibyutse.
TweakWhy_NetworkDiscovery: Yemerera iyi PC kubona ibindi bikoresho ku rusobe rwa hafi no kuboneka na byo. Birakenewe kugira ngo ushakishe ibisangiwe ku rusobe muri File Explorer. Iyi mpinduka ifite ikiza cyo hagati kandi ishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe na bimwe.
TweakWhy_NetworkFromLockScreen: Igenzura niba buto yo guhitamo urusobe igaragara ku ecran yo gufunga mbere y'uko umukoresha yinjira.
TweakWhy_NetworkProtection: Kurinda imiyoboro ya Microsoft Defender ibuza guhuza imiyoboro izwi na aderesi ya IP kurwego rwurusobe. Ihinduka ritwara ibyago biciriritse kandi birashobora kugira ingaruka kubikorwa bimwe.
TweakWhy_NewAppPrompt: Iyo ugerageje gufungura ubwoko bw'idosiye itagira porogaramu, Windows yerekana kashe ikubaza uko uyifungura. Kuyihagarika bihisha iyi nyandiko.
TweakWhy_NewOutlook: Igenzura niba porogaramu nshya ya Outlook iboneka. Hagarika ukomeze gukoresha porogaramu ya kera ya Mail na Calendar.
TweakWhy_Notifications: Urufunguzo rukuru rwa sisitemu yose ya Windows yo kumenyesha. Kuyihagarika bihagarika imenyesha zose za porogaramu kandi bihisha ikigo cyo kumenyesha. Iri ni impinduka ifite ikiza kinini ishobora kuba ikomeye cyangwa idashoboka kubisubizaho.
TweakWhy_NumLock: Igenzura niba urufunguzo Num Lock ruhita rufungurwa iyo Windows itangiye. Emera kugira ngo utangire buri gihe ufite number pad ikora.
TweakWhy_OneDrive: Shyira umukiriya wa sync ya desktop ya OneDrive, cyangwa ikuraho porogaramu hamwe na Explorer ihuza. Gukuramo ni paki yo gukuraho akazi, ntabwo byoroshye guhinduranya, kandi kuyigarura birashobora gusaba gushiraho, kongera kwinjira, no gutegereza sync kugirango ikire.
TweakWhy_OneDriveFileExplorerAd: OneDrive yerekana imenyekanisha ryamamaza imbere muri File Explorer igutera inkunga yo guhuza dosiye. Guhisha bikuraho banneri.
TweakWhy_OpenFileExplorerTo: Ishyiraho ahantu h'ibanze File Explorer ifungura iyo itangiriye kuri taskbar cyangwa Start Menu.
TweakWhy_OpenWindowsTerminalAdminContext: Fungura Windows Terminal nk'admin mu buryo bw'ibanze
TweakWhy_PUAppsDetection: Yemerera Defender kumenya no gushyira ku ruhande porogaramu zishobora kutifuzwa nka adware, bundleware, na browser hijacker. Iyi mpinduka ifite ikiza cyo hagati kandi ishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe na bimwe.
TweakWhy_PerformanceTuning: Runs a set of legacy system optimisations and boot configuration adjustments to improve general system responsiveness. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_PowerPlan: Ishyiraho gahunda y'amashanyarazi ya Windows. Balanced ipima imikorere hashingiwe ku mutwaro. High Performance igumisha CPU ku muvuduko wuzuye. Ultimate Performance ikuraho kubuza amashanyarazi yose kugira ngo habe umusaruro mwinshi. Ultimate Performance ishobora kutaboneka kuri sisitemu zose.
TweakWhy_PowerShellModulesLogging: Yandika buri komandi ikozwe na module za PowerShell mu kinyamakuru cy'ibyabaye cya Windows. Nibyiza mu kugenzura umutekano no mu iperereza ku byabaye.
TweakWhy_PowerShellScriptsLogging: Yandika ibikubiye byose muri buri script block ya PowerShell ikora mu kinyamakuru cy'ibyabaye cya Windows. Bifasha mu iperereza nyuma y'ibyabaye.
TweakWhy_Powershell7Telemetry: PowerShell 7 yohereza amakuru yimikoreshereze atazwi kuri Microsoft muburyo budasanzwe. Kwanga guhitamo muriyi telemetrie. Bihujwe no Kwinjiza / Kuvugurura PowerShell 7 ihitamo.
TweakWhy_PreventEdgeShortcutCreation: Ihagarika Microsoft Edge kongera gukora shortcut yayo ku biro nyuma yo kuvugurura. Bikurikizwa ku miyoboro yose ya Edge.
TweakWhy_PrintCMDContext: Yerekana cyangwa yihisha ihitamo rya Print ku menu yo gukanda iburyo ku madosiye ya script ya .bat na .cmd.
TweakWhy_ProtectClickOnce: Ihagarika inyandiko zo kwizera za ClickOnce ku turere twose tw'umutekano. Ibuza porogaramu za ClickOnce zitizewe kubaza kwinjizwa. Iri ni impinduka ifite ikiza kinini ishobora kuba ikomeye cyangwa idashoboka kubisubizaho.
TweakWhy_ProtectFileSystemPerformance: Ihagarika gukora amazina magufi ya 8.3 kuri NTFS. Inoza imikorere ya sisitemu y'amadosiye kandi ikuraho ikintu cya kera cyo guhuza gikunze kutabacyenewe uyu munsi.
TweakWhy_ProtectMSOffice: Iziga macro, gukora ibirimo byo hanze, n'amashyiraho yo kwizera ya Outlook muri verisiyo za Office. Igabanya inzira z'ibitero bishingiye ku nyandiko. Iri ni impinduka ifite ikiza kinini ishobora kuba ikomeye cyangwa idashoboka kubisubizaho.
TweakWhy_ProtectMSOfficeLinks: Ibuza Word kwivugurura mu buryo bwikora amahuza yo hanze mu nyandiko na email. Igabanya ikiza cyo kohereza amakuru binyuze mu mahuza y'inyandiko. Iri ni impinduka ifite ikiza kinini ishobora kuba ikomeye cyangwa idashoboka kubisubizaho.
TweakWhy_ProtectOS: Applies a broad set of registry hardening values covering credential protection, UAC, NTLM, TCP/IP, and smart card removal behaviour. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.
TweakWhy_ProtectRPCSurface: Ihagarika RPC-over-TCP kuri Task Scheduler na Service Control Manager ya kure. Igabanya kugaragazwa ku nzira z'ibitero byo gucunga kure. Iri ni impinduka ifite ikiza kinini ishobora kuba ikomeye cyangwa idashoboka kubisubizaho.
TweakWhy_ProtectWinRM: Ihagarika urujya n'uruza rwa WinRM rutavunitse no kwemeza digest, hanyuma igasubukura serivisi ya WinRM. Isuzuma ko kuguhuza ku bucungire bwa kure buhora bwuzuye. Iyi mpinduka ifite ikiza cyo hagati kandi ishobora kugira ingaruka ku bikorwa bimwe na bimwe.
TweakWhy_PrtScnSnippingTool: Ituma urufunguzo rwa Print Screen rufungura Snipping Tool kugira ngo ufate ishusho ya ecran mu buryo bukora aho gukoporora mu ibanga kuri clipboard.
TweakWhy_QoS: Quality of Service packet scheduler ishobora gushyira imbere ubwoko bumwe bw'urujya n'uruza rw'urusobe. Birakenewe kugira ngo ibintu bimwe bya QoS by'urusobe bikore neza.
TweakWhy_QuickAccessFrequentFolders: Igice cya Quick Access muri Explorer gishobora kwerekana amabubiko asurwa cyane. Hisha kugira ngo Quick Access yerekane gusa amabubiko wahomekeye.
TweakWhy_QuickAccessRecentFiles: Igice cya Quick Access muri Explorer gishobora kwerekana amadosiye vuba yafunguwe. Hisha kugira ngo Quick Access yerekane gusa amabubiko wahomekeye.
TweakWhy_RazerBlock: Ibuza script za installer ya Razer Synapse gukora mu buryo bwikora. Ibuza software ya Razer itifuzwa gushyirwaho mu nyuma. Iri ni impinduka ifite ikiza kinini ishobora kuba ikomeye cyangwa idashoboka kubisubizaho.
TweakWhy_RecentFiles: Igenzura niba Windows ikurikirana amadosiye yafunguwe vuba kugira ngo ayerekane muri Quick Access n'amakashe yo Gufungura. Hagarika guhagarika uku gukurikirana.
TweakWhy_RecentShortcuts: Yerekana amadosiye n'amabubiko yafunguwe vuba n'akunze gufungurwa nka shortcut mu gice cya Quick Access cya Explorer.
TweakWhy_RecentlyAddedApps: Yerekana urutonde rwa porogaramu zashyizweho vuba muri Start Menu. Hagarika kugira ngo urutonde rwa porogaramu rwa Start Menu rusukuye.
TweakWhy_RecommendedTroubleshooting: Igenzura niba Windows ikora troubleshooter mu buryo bwikora iyo ibibazo bibonetse. Iyo ibanze iracyabaza uruhushya rwawe mbere yo gukora.
TweakWhy_RecycleBinDeleteConfirmation: Yerekana kashe yo kwemeza mbere yo kwimura amadosiye muri Recycle Bin. Emera kugira ngo urinde gusiba ku mpanuka.
TweakWhy_RegistryBackup: Yemerera gukora backup y'igihe gito y'amadosiye ya registry hive ya Windows mu ibubiko rya RegBack mu bubiko bwa Windows.
TweakWhy_RepairSharedPrinterConnectionEr: Ikosora amakosa asanzwe yo kwihuza ku mashini icapa ku ruhande rwa host na client mu guhuza amagenamiterere ya RPC, SMB, Point and Print, spooler, TCP, no kuvumbura urusobe. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago byo hagati kandi risaba kongera gutangira.
TweakWhy_RepairWindows11SMBUpdateIssue: Ikosora ikibazo kizwi mu makoraniro amwe ya Windows 11 aho kugera kuri SMB share bitsinda nyuma yo kuvugurura kubera agaciro ka registry kabuze.
TweakWhy_ReservedStorage: Windows ibika gigabytes nyinshi z'umwanya wa disiki ku bwo kuvugurura, amadosiye y'igihe gito, na caches. Guhagarika bisubiza uyu mwanya wabitswe nyuma y'ivugurura rikurikira. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago byo hagati kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mikorere imwe.
TweakWhy_RestartDeviceAfterUpdate: Yemerera Windows gutegura kongera gutangira vuba bishoboka nyuma yo kurangiza kwinjiza ivugurura.
TweakWhy_RestartNotification: Yerekana itangazo muri taskbar iyo Windows Update yamaze kwinjizwa kandi isaba kongera gutangira kugira ngo irangire.
TweakWhy_RestoreFldrWindows: Isubira gufungura amadirishya yose ya Explorer yari afunguye igihe wasohokaga bwa nyuma. Isubiza imiterere y'akazi kako kuri buri kwinjira.
TweakWhy_RevertStartMenu: Isubiza Start Menu ku miterere ya mbere ya 24H2 ku makoraniro ya Windows 11 24H2. Rishobora kugira ingaruka ku kubana n'ivugurura rya Windows rizaza. Iri ni ihinduka rifite ibyago byinshi rishobora kuba rigoye cyangwa bidashoboka gusubiza.
TweakWhy_S3Sleep: S3 ni uburyo gakondo bwo gusinzira cyane aho PC izimya byuzuye ibice. Sisitemu zimwe zikoresha Modern Standby nk'iya default, ishobora gucururuza amashanyarazi mu gihe idakoreshwa.
TweakWhy_SMB1: SMBv1 ni protocol y'ikoreshwa ry'amadosiye ishaje kandi ihari ibyago, izwiho ibyitso bya EternalBlue. Hagarika keretse bikenewe ku bikoresho bya kera cyane by'urusobe. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago byo hagati kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mikorere imwe.
TweakWhy_SMBServer: Yemera igice cya SMB file server gituma izindi mudasobwa zo ku rusobe zigera ku bubiko busangiwe n'imashini icapa kuri iyi PC. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago byo hagati kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mikorere imwe.
TweakWhy_SaveRestartableApps: Windows ishobora kubika imiterere ya apps zifunguye igihe usohoka no kongera kuzifungura mu buryo bwikora nyuma yo kwinjira ubutaha.
TweakWhy_SaveZoneInformation: Iyo ukuyemo dosiye kuri enterineti, Windows irayiranga hamwe na zone ya zone. Kugumana ibi bishoboza kwemerera kuburira umutekano mugihe ukoresha dosiye zimaze gukururwa.
TweakWhy_ScheduledTasks: Imirimo myinshi iteganyijwe ikora inyuma kugira ngo ikusanye no kohereza amakuru y'isesengura. Guhagarika bibuza iyi mirimo gukora mu buryo bwikora. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago byo hagati kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mikorere imwe.
TweakWhy_SearchAppInStore: Iyo ufunguye idosiye ifite extension itazwi, Windows ishobora kugusaba kureba muri Microsoft Store. Guhagarika bisimbuka iri pendekezo.
TweakWhy_SearchHighlights: Ibyatsi bikuru bishakishwa muri Windows Search
TweakWhy_SelectCheckboxes: Yongeraho udusanduku two guhitamo iruhande rw'amadosiye n'ububiko muri Explorer kugira ngo guhitamo byinshi bibe byoroshye utagombye gufata Ctrl.
TweakWhy_Sensors: Igenzura uburyo bwo kugera ku nyangingo z'ibikoresho nka accelerometer, gyroscope, n'umurimaji w'urumuri rw'akarere. Byibanda cyane ku ma tablets n'ibikoresho bihinduka.
TweakWhy_ServicesManual: Ishyira ihitamo rya serivisi za Windows zidakenewe cyane kuva kuri Automatic kugeza kuri Manual startup. Serivisi zizakomeza gutangira igihe zikeneye. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago byo hagati kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mikorere imwe.
TweakWhy_SetDLLHijackingPrevention: Itunganya urutonde rwo gushaka DLL rwa Session Manager kugira ngo ibuze apps gutangura DLLs ziva ahatizewe. Ifunga inzira isanzwe yo gutanga malware. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago byo hagati kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mikorere imwe.
TweakWhy_SetDefenderExploitGuardPolicy: Ishyira mu bikorwa amategeko yongeyeho yo kugabanya ubuso bwo gutera bya Exploit Guard binyuze muri Windows Defender kugira ngo ihagarike uburyo busanzwe bwa malware. Iri ni ihinduka rifite ibyago byinshi rishobora kuba rigoye cyangwa bidashoboka gusubiza.
TweakWhy_SetLOLBinFirewallRules: Yongeraho amategeko ya firewall abuza ibisohoka kuri binaries zubatswe muri Windows zikunze gukoreshwa nabi na malware (LOLBins) mu guhamagara mu rugo cyangwa gukuramo payloads. Iri ni ihinduka rifite ibyago byinshi rishobora kuba rigoye cyangwa bidashoboka gusubiza.
TweakWhy_SetNtpServerOverride: Kurenga Windows Igihe cyo gukoresha pool.ntp.org aho gukoresha seriveri isanzwe ya Windows.
TweakWhy_SetSMBSharingCompatibility: Ibika iboneza rya SMB share ririho n'ibyangombwa by'urusobe byabitswe igihe irindi hinduka ry'urusobe rikoreshwa. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago byo hagati kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mikorere imwe.
TweakWhy_SetWindowsFirewallLogging: Yemera kubika ibyanditswe by'ibihuza byajugunywe n'ibyemewe mu idosiye y'ibyanditswe bya Windows Firewall kugira ngo ushobore kugenzura ibikorwa by'urusobe.
TweakWhy_SettingsSuggestedContent: Porogaramu ya Settings ishobora kwerekana amapendekezo yatewe inkunga n'inama hamwe n'amagenamiterere yawe. Guhisha bikuraho ibi bikubiyemo by'ibyamamaza.
TweakWhy_ShareMenu: Yongeraho ihitamo rya Share kuri menu ya kanda iburyo ku madosiye, ikwemerera kubisangira binyuze muri apps cyangwa Windows nearby sharing.
TweakWhy_SharedExperiences: Yemerera Windows gusangira ibikorwa hagati y'ibikoresho byawe binyuze muri konti ya Microsoft. Guhagarika bibika ibikorwa byigenga kuri iyi mashini gusa.
TweakWhy_SharingMappedDrives: Yemera ko ama drives y'urusobe yashushanyijwe agaragara ku mashini zifite uburenganzira bwo hejuru (administrator) nka n'uwinjiye ubu. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago byo hagati kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mikorere imwe.
TweakWhy_SharingWizard: Yemera wizard yoroheje yo gusangira amadosiye iyo ukanze iburyo ku idosiye cyangwa ububiko ugahitamo kubisangira.
TweakWhy_ShortcutArrow: Yerekana cyangwa ihisha akamenyetso k'akambi gato ku madosiye y'ihuza kugira ngo bigaragaze ko ari amahuza atari amadosiye yumwimerere.
TweakWhy_ShortcutsSuffix: Igenzura niba Windows yongera - Shortcut ku izina ry'amahuza mashya yakozwe kuri desktop.
TweakWhy_ShutdownFromLockScreen: Igenzura niba buto zo guhagarika no kongera gutangira zigaragara kuri Windows lock screen.
TweakWhy_SigninInfo: Ikoresha ibyangombwa byawe byo kwinjira kugira ngo irangize gushyiraho umwirondoro wawe mu buryo bwikora nyuma yo kuvugurura Windows. Hagarika kugira ngo ubungabunge ubuzima bwite.
TweakWhy_SleepButton: Igenzura niba ihitamo rya Sleep rigaragara mu Start Menu kandi niba buto yo gusinzira ku mwandiko ikora.
TweakWhy_SleepTimeout: Igenzura igihe ecran izimira n'igihe PC yinjira mu buryo bwo gusinzira nyuma yo kudakora. Hagarika kugira ngo ubuze gusinzira byikora.
TweakWhy_SnapAssist: Iyo ukoresheje snap ku idirishya ku ruhande rumwe, Windows isaba andi madirishya afunguye kuzuza umwanya usigaye. Hagarika kugira ngo ukoreshe snap utagira amapendekezo.
TweakWhy_StandbyFix: Modern Standby (S0) can cause high CPU and power usage while the PC appears to be sleeping. This fix switches to S3-style deep sleep behaviour.
TweakWhy_StartAccountNotifications: Microsoft irashobora kwerekana imenyekanisha rijyanye na konti hamwe nibisobanuro muri menu yo gutangira. Guhisha bikuraho ibi.
TweakWhy_StartLayout: Igenzura igipimo cy'imiterere y'imenu ya Start ya Windows 11 hagati ya apps zatsindagiwe n'ibyasabwe.
TweakWhy_StartMenuAllSectionCategories: Igice cyose gifite ibyiciro muri Start (24H2+)
TweakWhy_StartRecommendationsTips: Start Menu ishobora kwerekana inama zerekeye ibiranga Windows n'ibyasabwe ku apps nshya. Guhisha bikuraho aya mapendekezo.
TweakWhy_StartRecommendedSection: Yerekana cyangwa ihisha igice Recommended hasi ya Start Menu. Ku matsinda ya Enterprise na Education, iki gishobora guhishwa binyuze muri politike.
TweakWhy_StartupSound: Ikina indirimbo yo gutangira ya Windows iyo desktop yinjiye nyuma yo kwinjira.
TweakWhy_StickyShift: Gukanda Shift inshuro eshanu vuba bitangiza ikiganiro cya Sticky Keys cyo kworohereza. Hagarika kugira ngo ubuze ibi guhungabanya akazi kawe.
TweakWhy_StorageSense: Yikora ifungura umwanya kuri disiki hakurikijwe gahunda mu gusiba amadosiye y'igihe gito, ibikuramo bya kera, n'ibikubiye muri Recycle Bin.
TweakWhy_SuperHiddenFiles: Yerekana amadosiye ya sisitemu ya Windows yarinzwe muri File Explorer. Aya ahishwa mu buryo bwa default kugira ngo ubuze ihinduka cyangwa gusibwa atari ngombwa.
TweakWhy_Superfetch: SysMain iteguza apps zikoreshwa kenshi muri RAM kugira ngo yihutishe igihe cyo gutangira. Kuri SSDs itanga inyungu nke kandi ishobora guhagarikwa nta kibazo. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago byo hagati kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mikorere imwe.
TweakWhy_SuspendAirstrikeAttack: Ihisha UI yo guhitamo urusobe kuri Windows lock screen. Ibuza guhindura amagenamiterere y'urusobe mbere yo kwinjira. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago byo hagati kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mikorere imwe.
TweakWhy_SyncNotifications: OneDrive hamwe nabandi batanga sync barashobora kwerekana imenyekanisha ryamamaza imbere muri Explorer. Hagarika guhisha banneri.
TweakWhy_TailoredExperiences: Uses your diagnostic data to show personalised tips, ads, and recommendations from Microsoft. Disabling opts you out.
TweakWhy_TaskManagerDetails: Ifungura Task Manager ako kanya ku igice Details rigaragaza imirimo yose aho kuba incamake yoroheje.
TweakWhy_TaskViewButton: Buto ya Task View kuri taskbar
TweakWhy_TaskbarCombine: Uburyo buto za taskbar zishyirwa hamwe
TweakWhy_TaskbarEndTask: Ongeraho End Task kuri menu ya kanda iburyo ya taskbar
TweakWhy_TaskbarSearch: Uburyo bwo kwerekana ubushakashatsi kuri taskbar
TweakWhy_Teredo: Teredo ni protocole ya tunnel itanga IPv6 ihuza imiyoboro ya IPv4. Birakenewe kugirango Xbox Live ihuze hamwe na porogaramu zurungano. Ihinduka ryimpanuka nyinshi zishobora kugorana cyangwa zidashoboka guhinduka.
TweakWhy_ThisPC: Yerekana cyangwa ihisha ikimenyetso This PC kuri desktop yawe kugira ngo wihute kugera kuri drives n'ibikoresho.
TweakWhy_ThumbnailCache: Windows ibika amashusho y'ibanze mu idosiye y'ububikoshingiro yihishe kugira ngo yihutishe kureba ububiko. Guhagarika bibuza iyi cache kubikwa kuri disiki.
TweakWhy_Thumbnails: Yerekana amashusho n'amashusho ya videwo nk'amashusho y'ibanze muri Explorer aho kuba ibimenyetso rusange by'ubwoko bw'idosiye. Guhagarika byerekana ibimenyetso gusa.
TweakWhy_ThumbsDBOnNetwork: Windows ikora amadosiye Thumbs.db yahishwe ku masangiye y'urusobe kugira ngo ibike amashusho y'ibanze muri cache. Guhagarika bibuza aya madosiye gukorwa ku rusobe.
TweakWhy_TitleBarColor: Colours window title bars to match your Windows accent colour instead of showing them in plain white or grey.
TweakWhy_TrayIcons: Yerekana ibimenyetso byose by'itangazo mu gace ka sisitemu aho guhisha ibimenyetso bisumba inyuma y'umwambi wo kwagura.
TweakWhy_UWPAccountInfo: Igenzura niba apps za UWP zishobora kugera ku izina rya konti yawe, ifoto, n'andi makuru ya konti.
TweakWhy_UWPApps: Ifungura ikiganiro cyo guhitamo cyo gukuraho cyangwa gusubiza apps zatoranyijwe za Windows Store. Ibikurwaho bimwe ni nzira imwe, kandi inzira zishyigikiwe zo gusubiza zishobora gusaba Microsoft Store, winget, cyangwa gusubiza intoki. Iri ni igikorwa gifite ibyago byinshi cya package aho kuba toggle yoroheje.
TweakWhy_UWPCalendar: Igenzura niba apps za UWP zishobora gusoma no kwandika ku makuru ya kalendari yawe.
TweakWhy_UWPCallHistory: Igenzura niba apps za UWP zishobora gusoma amateka yawe y'amahamagara.
TweakWhy_UWPContacts: Igenzura niba apps za UWP zishobora kugera ku rutonde rw'abo mufitanye umubano.
TweakWhy_UWPDiagInfo: Igenzura niba apps za UWP zishobora gukusanya amakuru y'isesengura ku gikoresho cyawe n'uko giri.
TweakWhy_UWPEmail: Igenzura niba apps za UWP zishobora gusoma no kohereza imeri mu izina ryawe.
TweakWhy_UWPFileSystem: Igenzura niba apps za UWP zishobora kugera ku madosiye ahari hose muri sisitemu yawe y'amadosiye hanze y'ububiko bwazo. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago byo hagati kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mikorere imwe.
TweakWhy_UWPMessaging: Igenzura niba apps za UWP zishobora gusoma no kohereza ubutumwa bugufi.
TweakWhy_UWPNotifications: Igenzura niba apps za UWP zishobora kohereza amatangazo ku kigo cy'amatangazo cya Windows.
TweakWhy_UWPOtherDevices: Igenzura niba apps za UWP zishobora kugera ku bindi bikoresho bifatanyije bitari mu byiciro biranga.
TweakWhy_UWPPhoneCalls: Igenzura niba apps za UWP zishobora guhamagara no gucunga amahamagara.
TweakWhy_UWPRadios: Igenzura niba apps za UWP zishobora kugenzura Bluetooth n'ibindi bikoresho bya radiyo bitagira insinga.
TweakWhy_UWPSwapFile: Idosiye ya UWP swap (swapfile.sys) ikoreshwa n'apps za Windows Store ku kubika ububiko bwa mudasobwa. Guhagarika birekura umwanya wa disiki niba udakoresha Store apps. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago byo hagati kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mikorere imwe.
TweakWhy_UWPTasks: Igenzura niba apps za UWP zishobora kugera ku mirimo yawe n'urutonde rw'ibyo kora.
TweakWhy_UWPVoiceActivation: Igenzura niba apps za UWP zishobora gutangizwa hakoreshejwe amabwiriza y'ijwi inyuma.
TweakWhy_UnknownNetworks: Ishyira umwirondoro w'urusobe wa default ukoreshwa ku mihuza mishya cyangwa itazwi y'urusobe iyo ibonetse bwa mbere. Iri hinduka rifite ibyago byo hagati kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mikorere imwe.
TweakWhy_UnpinTaskbarShortcuts: Kuraho amahuza ya taskbar yaje hamwe
TweakWhy_UpdateAdobereaderDCSTIG: Ishyiraho amategeko y'umutekano kuri Adobe Reader DC harimo uburyo burinzwe, ibyerekanwa birinzwe, no guhagarika ibikorwa bya cloud na web. Iri ni ihinduka riteje akaga kenshi kandi rishobora kuba rigoye cyangwa ntirishoboke gusubizwa inyuma.
TweakWhy_UpdateAutoDownload: Igenzura niba Windows Update ikuramo updates mu buryo bwikora mu nyuma. Kubihagarika bikwemerera guhitamo igihe cyo gukuramo updates. Iri hinduka rifite akaga gakiye kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mirimo imwe n'imwe.
TweakWhy_UpdateCipherSuites: Ishyiraho cipher suites ikunzwe mu SCHANNEL kuri AES-256 na AES-128 zikomeye. Yemeza encryption ikomeye kuri za connections zose za TLS. Iri hinduka rifite akaga gakiye kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mirimo imwe n'imwe.
TweakWhy_UpdateDesktopRegistry: Ikuraho akamenyetso gato k'amakuru kagaragara kuri desktop igihe Windows Spotlight wallpapers zikora.
TweakWhy_UpdateDotNetStrongAuth: Ihatira .NET Framework 4.x na 2.x gukoresha TLS isanzwe ya sisitemu na cryptography ikomeye. Ibuza apps za .NET za kera kugaruka ku cipher zidakomeye. Iri hinduka rifite akaga gakiye kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mirimo imwe n'imwe.
TweakWhy_UpdateDriver: Igenzura niba Windows Update ikuramo kandi igashyiraho drivers z'ibikoresho mu buryo bwikora. Kubihagarika bikwemerera gucunga drivers wenyine. Iri hinduka rifite akaga gakiye kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mirimo imwe n'imwe.
TweakWhy_UpdateEventLogSize: Iyongera ingano ntarengwa ya Windows Security event log kuri 1 MB. Ifasha kubika audit events nyinshi mbere y'uko iza kera zisimburwa.
TweakWhy_UpdateKeyExchanges: Yemerera Diffie-Hellman, ECDH, na PKCS key exchange algorithms muri SCHANNEL. Yemeza ko key exchange ifite umutekano iboneka kuri za connections za TLS. Iri hinduka rifite akaga gakiye kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mirimo imwe n'imwe.
TweakWhy_UpdateMSProducts: Iyo byemejwe, Windows Update na yo ireba updates z'ibindi bicuruzwa bya Microsoft nka Office. Kubihagarika bigarukira updates za Windows gusa.
TweakWhy_UpdateMSRT: Igenzura niba Windows Update itanga scan ya Malicious Software Removal Tool. Kubihagarika bibuza ko yoherezwa binyuze muri Windows Update. Iri hinduka rifite akaga gakiye kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mirimo imwe n'imwe.
TweakWhy_UpdateMicrosoftProducts: Iyo byemejwe, Windows Update na yo ireba kandi igashyiraho updates z'ibindi bicuruzwa bya Microsoft byashyizweho hamwe na updates za Windows.
TweakWhy_UpdatePowershell: PowerShell 7 nigikonoshwa kigezweho kigezweho hamwe nibikorwa byiza kandi biranga hejuru yubatswe muri Windows PowerShell 5.1. Bihujwe na PS7 Telemetry guhinduranya.
TweakWhy_UpdateProtocols: TLS 1.0 na 1.1 byaracitse kandi bifite ibibazo by'umutekano bizwi. Kubihagarika bikomeza sisitemu mu bitero bya BEAST, POODLE, n'ibindi. Kubisubiza bigomba gukorwa gusa ku bijyanye no guhuza n'ibya kera.
TweakWhy_UpdateRegistryPaths: Ikora registry paths zose zibura zikenewe n'ibindi bintu byo gukomeza umutekano mbere y'uko bikora. Iki ni igikorwa kibanza nta ngaruka zigaragara ku mukoresha.
TweakWhy_UpdateRestart: Ibuza Windows kwikora restart mu buryo bwikora nyuma yo gushyiraho updates utabitangiye. Ikuha ubushobozi bwo kugenzura igihe reboot izabera.
TweakWhy_UseStoreOpenWith: Yerekana cyangwa ihisha amahitamo ya Look for an app in the Microsoft Store agaragara muri Open With dialog ku bwoko bw'amafayili adafitanye isano.
TweakWhy_VerboseStatus: Yerekana ubutumwa bwambere burambuye mu gihe cyo gutangira no kwifunga kwa Windows aho kuba spinner rusange gusa.
TweakWhy_VisualFX: Igenzura igenamiterere rusange ry'ingaruka zigaragara. Performance ihagarika animations kugira ngo ikore vuba. Appearance yemera ingaruka zose.
TweakWhy_WAPPush: Serivisi ya WAP Push messaging yakira ubutumwa bwo mu kirere buva kuri ba carriers ba mobile. Ntabwo ikenewe cyane kuri PC itari ihuye na network ya mobile.
TweakWhy_WPBT: WPBT ni imbonerahamwe ya firmware yemerera abakora kugira software zikoresha mu gihe cyo gutangira Windows. Kubihagarika bibuza executables zashyizwemo n'abakora kwikora. Iri hinduka rifite akaga gakiye kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mirimo imwe n'imwe.
TweakWhy_WebLangList: Ihuza urutonde rw'indimi ukunda kuri server ya Microsoft kugira ngo web content ihuze n'ibyo ukunda. Hagarika kugira ngo ugire ibanga ryinshi.
TweakWhy_WebSearch: Ihuza ibisubizo bya Bing web muri Windows search bar. Kubihagarika bituma search ya sisitemu yerekana gusa amafayili ya hafi n'amagenamiterere.
TweakWhy_WhatsNewInWindows: Yerekana banners n'ibimenyetso byerekana ibintu bishya bya Windows nyuma ya updates. Hagarika kugira ngo uhagarike izi menyesha.
TweakWhy_WiFiSense: WiFi Sense can automatically share your WiFi password with your contacts. Disabling prevents this sharing behaviour.
TweakWhy_Win32LongPathLimit: Ikuraho umupaka w'inyuguti 260 ku nzira y'ifayili kuri Win32 applications. Bikenewe ku bikoresho bimwe bya development n'imiterere igoye ya folders.
TweakWhy_WindowsCapabilities: Ifungura dialog y'ibintu byihariye byo kongeraho cyangwa gukuraho ubushobozi bwa Windows nka language packs cyangwa ibikoresho bya RSAT. Recovery ishobora gusaba uburenganzira bwa Windows Update, amafayili y'inkomoko, cyangwa restart, bityo ikaba igomba gufatwa nk'icungwa rya package aho kuba toggle yoroshye.
TweakWhy_WindowsColorMode: Ishyiraho niba Windows shell (taskbar, Start Menu, action center) ikoresha Dark cyangwa Light mode.
TweakWhy_WindowsFeatures: Ifungura dialog ya Turn Windows features on or off kugira ngo yemere cyangwa ihagarike ibintu byihariye bya Windows nka Hyper-V cyangwa Telnet. Iri hinduka rifite akaga gakiye kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mirimo imwe n'imwe.
TweakWhy_WindowsGameMode: Iki gigenzura igenamiterere ryashyizweho mu Windows Game Mode, si workflow ya Gaming profile ya Baseline. Windows Game Mode iha icyubahiro inzira z'imikino ikanahagarika ibikorwa byo mu nyuma. Bamwe mu bakoresha babihagarika kubera streaming cyangwa recording stability aho ihinduka ry'icyubahiro bishobora gutera encoder drops.
TweakWhy_WindowsLatestUpdate: Yandika iyi PC kwakira Windows updates akanya gato bisohotse aho gutegereza rollout buhoro buhoro. Iri hinduka rifite akaga gakiye kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mirimo imwe n'imwe.
TweakWhy_WindowsManageDefaultPrinter: Yemerera Windows gushyira printer wakoresheje vuba nka default mu buryo bwikora. Kubihagarika bikomeza printer wahisemo wenyine nka default.
TweakWhy_WindowsSandbox: Virtual machine yoroshye yitandukanijwe yo gukoresha neza applications zidizewe utabangamiye sisitemu yawe nyamukuru. Bisaba Windows Pro cyangwa hejuru.
TweakWhy_WindowsScriptHost: Igenzura niba Windows ishobora gukoresha amafayili ya .vbs na .js. Kubihagarika bibuza ubu bwoko bwa scripts gukora iyo ukanze kabiri. Iri hinduka rifite akaga gakiye kandi rishobora kugira ingaruka ku mirimo imwe n'imwe.
TweakWhy_WindowsTips: Windows yerekana ibimenyetso bya pop-up n'ibyifuzo mu gihe ukora. Kubihagarika bihagarika ibi biguhagarika.
TweakWhy_WindowsWelcomeExperience: Yerekana urupapuro rwo kwakira rwuzuye nyuma ya Windows updates zikomeye yerekana ibintu bishya. Hagarika kugira ngo usimbuke uru rupapuro.
TweakWhy_XboxGameBar: Xbox Game Bar ni overlay yo mu mukino (Win+G) kuri screenshots, kurekora videwo, no kugenzura imikorere ya sisitemu.
TweakWhy_XboxGameTips: Yerekana ibimenyetso byo kwinjira n'inama mu Xbox Game Bar overlay. Hagarika niba usanzwe uzi Game Bar.
TweakWinDefault_ActiveHours: Amasaha akora ahindurwa mu buryo bwikora
TweakWinDefault_AdminApprovalMode: UAC imenyesha gusa iyo apps zikora ihinduka (Default)
TweakWinDefault_AdobeNetworkBlock: Uburenganzira bwa network bwa Adobe ntabwo bwahagaritswe
TweakWinDefault_AdvertisingID: Apps can show personalised ads using advertising ID
TweakWinDefault_AeroShaking: Gutigisa title bar ntabwo bigabanya ibindi windows
TweakWinDefault_AppsLanguageSwitch: Uburyo bumwe bwo kwinjiza bukoreshwa muri windows zose z'apps
TweakWinDefault_AppsSilentInstalling: Gushyiraho mu buryo bwicecetse kwa apps zifuzwa byemewe
TweakWinDefault_AppsSmartScreen: Kugenzura SmartScreen ya porogaramu na dosiye birashoboka
TweakWinDefault_Autoplay: AutoPlay yemewe ku bikoresho byose n'amamedia
TweakWinDefault_BSoDStopError: Stop error code ntabwo yerekanwa kuri BSoD
TweakWinDefault_BingSearch: Ibisubizo by'ishakisha rya Bing muri Tangira menu birashoboka
TweakWinDefault_BootRecovery: Uburyo bwikora bwo gukira boot bwemewe
TweakWinDefault_BraveDebloat: Ibyiyongera bya Brave (rewards, wallet, VPN, AI) byemewe
TweakWinDefault_BuildNumberOnDesktop: Build number ntabwo yerekanwa kuri desktop
TweakWinDefault_CABInstallContext: Amahitamo yo gushyiraho yahishwe kuri CAB context menu
TweakWinDefault_Camera: Uburenganzira bwa Camera ku apps bwemewe
TweakWinDefault_ClearRecentFiles: Amafayili ya vuba ntabwo akurwaho iyo usohotse
TweakWinDefault_CompressedFolderNewConte: Compressed Folder yerekanwa muri New context menu
TweakWinDefault_ControlPanelView: Control Panel icons zerekanwa ku byiciro
TweakWinDefault_CurrentNetwork: Profile ya network ya none ishyizwe kuri Public
TweakWinDefault_DefaultTerminalApp: Windows Console Host ni terminal app isanzwe
TweakWinDefault_DefenderTrayIcon: Akamenyetso ka Windows Defender system tray karerekanwa
